title: ceiba pentandra
intro: Ceiba pentandra, also known as the Kapok tree or Ceiba tree, is a large tropical tree native to Central and South America. The tree has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The various health benefits of Ceiba pentandra include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Ceiba pentandra typically involve the bark, leaves, and seeds, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and topical ointments.
